rules.rule: HQ git remotes: 3 remotes — origin (hassaans/hq-starter-kit-internal, private), public (hassaans/hq-starter-kit, public fork), upstream (coreyepstein/hq-starter-kit, source). Pull updates: git fetch upstream && git merge upstream/main. Push to all: git push origin && git push public. Contribute back: push branch to upstream + open PR.
